name: Fresh Vegetable Basil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound fresh or frozen green peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion.
2. Slice celery into thin strips.
3. Cut carrots into 1/8 inch thick slices.
4. Cube potatoes.
5. Peel and dice tomatoes.
6. Break cauliflower into florets.
7. Slice zucchini into 1/4 inch thick strips.
8. In a 5-quart pan over medium heat, sauté onion, celery, and carrots with a small amount of water until tender (about 10 minutes).
9. Add potatoes, tomatoes, additional water, basil, garlic powder, bay leaf, thyme, parsley, and green peas to the pan.
10. Bring mixture to a boil, then cover and let simmer for 15 minutes.
11. Add cauliflower and zucchini, and continue simmering for another 10 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
12. Add peas and simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until desired tenderness is reached.
13. Season with salt if needed.
14. Serve garnished with a celery stalk and leaves attached, if desired.
